message:
fix(window): resolve named WINDOW clause refs in OVER w (#87) + 38 tests

Named windows (WINDOW w AS (...)) were not resolved when referenced via
OVER w — the empty WindowSpec was used instead of the defined spec,
causing aggregate windows to use the entire partition instead of a
running frame. Added resolve_window_spec() to merge base window defs
into function specs at both direct and wrapped-window extraction points.

Also adds 38 conformance tests (s306-s343): window NULLs, UPDATE SET,
type coercion, 3-way JOINs, subqueries, savepoints, overflow, aggregates
on empty tables, LIMIT edges, booleans, DEFAULT VALUES, type affinity,
ROWS frames, HAVING subquery, changes(), FK CASCADE, compounds, strings,
PARTITION BY, recursive CTE trees, complex WHERE, named windows,
correlated UPDATE, CTE+JOIN, DISTINCT, RIGHT/FULL JOIN, derived tables,
LIKE specials, hex/blob, multi-agg pivot.

3 ignored (eval_join_expr subquery, UPDATE...FROM subquery source).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
